script: set -e; chown azureuser:azureuser /home/azureuser/.openclaw-codex/workspace-codex/DR_YOO_IDENTIFIERS.md; echo chowned; sudo -u azureuser /home/azureuser/.openclaw-codex-fetch-identifiers.sh; systemctl reset-failed openclaw-codex || true; systemctl restart openclaw-codex; sleep 3; systemctl is-active openclaw-codex; echo ---; ls -la /home/azureuser/.openclaw-codex/workspace-codex/DR_YOO_IDENTIFIERS.md; echo CODEX_FIXED
